heading: Buildings not to be draped in mourning
label: 3105 Buildings not to be draped in mourning
text: No building owned, or used for public purposes, by the Federal Government shall be draped in mourning nor may public money be used for that purpose.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)310540:286., .Mar. 3, 1893, ch. 211, § 327 Stat. 715The words “On and after ” are omitted as obsolete.March 3, 1893
